finding: NOT a stale test — a BROKEN PRODUCTION UI. The route moved to the /api/v1/helm/* namespace and frontend/src/components/helm/topdown/HelmCouncilView.tsx was never updated. const STATE_URL = "/api/v1/council/state" -> 404. The component has been fetching a 404 in production.
why_it_was_invisible: The test that catches this lived in a suite that COULD NOT RUN — a basename collision aborted pytest collection. The regression was caught the moment the suite could execute for the first time.
fix: Fixed the UI, NOT the test. HelmCouncilView.tsx -> /api/v1/helm/council/state. Tests updated to the same real contract. 65 tests pass across both suites.
lesson: I nearly 'fixed' this by updating the test to match the code. That would have BURIED a live broken UI behind a green test. The test was right and the code was wrong.
